overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 featuring a cowboy character walking through rolling green hills. The character approaches and crosses a wooden truss bridge, pauses to survey the scenic landscape, then continues past a horse-drawn wagon along a winding dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rolling grassland with winding dirt trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt trail through grassy hills toward a wooden bridge in the distance

entered.detail: winding brown dirt path cutting through green grass
rolling green hills with tall grass on both sides of the trail
clusters of green leafy trees scattered across the hills
wooden bridge structure spanning a small valley in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open rolling grassland under a partly cloudy sky. Green fields stretch to either side with scattered trees, while a wooden truss bridge awaits in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden truss bridge crossing a small stream

events.description: character steps from dirt trail onto the wooden bridge deck

agents.ego_description: walking across the wooden bridge with railings on both sides, looking ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence railings lining both sides of the bridge
small waterway visible beneath the bridge through the gaps

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the wooden truss bridge, walking across the plank deck between weathered railings. The bridge spans a small stream below, with grassy banks visible on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge viewpoint overlooking forested valley

events.description: character stops walking and turns to look left at the distant landscape and smoke plume

agents.ego_description: standing still on the bridge, looking left toward the trees, hills, and a distant smoke plume rising from the forest

entered.detail: thin column of dark smoke rising from the distant tree line
dense green tree tops covering the hillside to the left

segments.scene_description: The character pauses mid-bridge and turns to survey the scenic view. A smoke plume rises from the distant forested hills while the camera pans across the lush green landscape to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge crossing with oncoming wagon traffic

events.description: horse-drawn covered wagon approaches and passes by in the opposite direction
character steps off the wooden bridge back onto the dirt trail

agents.ego_description: resuming walk across the bridge, passing a horse-drawn wagon coming the other way, then exiting onto the trail

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn covered wagon with canvas top moving slowly across the bridge in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wooden wagon with beige canvas cover pulled by horses

segments.scene_description: The character continues across the bridge, encountering a horse-drawn covered wagon traveling in the opposite direction. After passing the wagon, the character steps off the bridge back onto the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt trail through rolling grassland

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail away from the bridge through open grassland with scattered rocks and trees

entered.detail: cluster of large gray rocks on the left hillside
tall wooden structure visible on the distant right hill

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the bridge along the winding dirt trail through open grassland. Rocky outcroppings appear on the left while a distant wooden water tower stands on the right horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open grassland trail across a rustic bridge and back into a rolling rural landscape. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path through green fields under a partly cloudy sky, moving steadily toward a wooden truss bridge in the distance. As the character steps onto the weathered plank deck, the camera pauses mid-bridge to pan across the lush scenery and a distant plume of smoke rising from forested hills. The movement then resumes, passing a horse-drawn covered wagon traveling in the opposite direction before the character steps off the bridge and returns to the dirt trail. Finally, the scene expands as the character walks away from the bridge, passing rocky outcroppings on the left and a distant wooden water tower on the right horizon.
